rationale: Hard pass for Helix Jump. The Dragon Ball/Goku anime hook has zero connection to a character-less, geometric ball-drop loop — there's no way to bridge a charging energy blast into rotating a helix tower without bait-and-switch risk (and IP infringement exposure using Goku imagery). Audience skews male shonen-anime fans, which only partially overlaps Helix Jump's broad casual base, and the palette/style clash with the game's neon minimalist 3D look. Don't greenlight; if curiosity-animation is the desired lane, brief a custom anime-styled ball/tower fantasy instead.
